title: Koodathayi cyanide murders: Kerala HC rejects Jolly Joseph's challenge to examination of forensic expert
description: The Kerala High Court has dismissed a plea by Jollyamma Joseph, the prime accused in the Koodathayi cynaide murder cases, challenging a trial court order allowing the examination of a forensic expert who was earlier not included in the witness list [Jollyamma Joseph @ Jolly v State of Kerala].The said expert had analysed and issued reports on an allegedly forged will that is tied to the mass murders case. Justice CS Dias on June 5 held that the prosecution's failure to include the expert in its
